title: BioDistrict New Orleans Act
doc_html:
CHAPTER 27-E.

BIODISTRICT NEW ORLEANS ACT

§9039.61.  BioDistrict New Orleans Act

This Chapter shall be known as the "BioDistrict New Orleans Act".

Acts 2005, No. 487, §1, eff. July 12, 2005; Acts 2011, No. 400, §1.
